description_long: This is a rectangular, modern-style table with a flat, solid top and four straight legs positioned at each corner. The table is finished in a uniform matte black color, giving it a sleek and minimalist appearance suitable for contemporary urban environments. The legs are simple and unadorned, providing stable support and a clean silhouette. The tabletop appears to be of moderate thickness, with no visible drawers, handles, or decorative elements. The construction suggests it is made primarily of wood or engineered wood, possibly with a laminate or painted finish. Its design is utilitarian, making it ideal for use in public spaces, parks, or communal urban areas.
description: A sleek, rectangular black table with a flat top and four straight legs, featuring a minimalist and modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the tabletop and all four legs, highlighting the table's rectangular shape and clean lines.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow depth of the tabletop and two visible legs, emphasizing the table's slim profile.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the full width and all four legs, with no additional features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the table's depth and two legs from the other side.
